{ "name": "livecontrol/eloquent-datatable", "description": "Eloquent DataTable plugin for server side ajax call handling.", "keywords": [ "eloquent", "laravel", "datatable" ], "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "Jeffrey de Vreede", "email": "jeffrey@devreede.eu" } ], "require": { "php": "^7.3 || ^8.0.2 || ^8.1", "illuminate/database": "5.*|6.*|7.*|8.*|9.*|10.*|11.*|12.*" }, "require-dev": { "phpspec/phpspec": "~2.1" }, "autoload": { "psr-0": { "LiveControl\\EloquentDataTable": "src/" } }, "minimum-stability": "stable" }
